languages.text: "Моя величайшая вина — в том, что я не уничтожил тебя сразу же, тварь. Нет ни одной тайны достаточно ценной, чтобы оправдать твое существование. Теперь я это знаю".
"My greatest transgression is that I didn't destroy you immediately, you wretch. There is no secret valuable enough to justify your existence. Of that, I am now certain."
languages.original_text: "Моя величайшая вина — в том, что я не уничтожил тебя сразу же, тварь. Нет ни одной тайны достаточно ценной, чтобы оправдать твое существование. Теперь я это знаю".

traits.locale_text: "My greatest transgression is that I didn't destroy you outright, you wretch. There is no secret valuable enough to justify your existence. Of that, I am now certain."

"My greatest transgression is that I was enticed by your words, stranger. Is that not the truth?" {n}Eo-gann still carefully averts his gaze. It is impossible to tell at whom the bitterness in his words is directed.{/n}

"My greatest transgression is that I was enticed by your words, stranger. Is that not the truth?" {n}Eo-gann still carefully averts his gaze. It is impossible to tell at whom the bitterness in his words is directed.{/n}
"My greatest transgression is that I didn't destroy you outright, you wretch. There is no secret valuable enough to justify your existence. Of that, I am now certain."
"My greatest transgression is that I didn't destroy you immediately, you wretch. There is no secret valuable enough to justify your existence. Of that, I am now certain."

languages.text: “我最大的过错，就是没有立刻毁了你，你这混账。不管你知道什么惊天秘密，都不值得让你这种东西继续活着。这一点，我现在无比确信。”
languages.original_text: "My greatest transgression is that I didn't destroy you immediately, you wretch. There is no secret valuable enough to justify your existence. Of that, I am now certain."

traits.locale_text: “我最大的过错，就是没有立刻毁了你，你这混账。不管你知道什么惊天秘密，都不值得让你这种东西继续活着。这一点，我现在无比确信。”

languages.text: «Mi mayor transgresión es no haberte destruido de inmediato, escoria. No hay secreto suficientemente valioso como para justificar tu existencia. Ya no me cabe ninguna duda».
languages.original_text: "My greatest transgression is that I didn't destroy you immediately, you wretch. There is no secret valuable enough to justify your existence. Of that, I am now certain."

traits.locale_text: «Mi mayor transgresión es no haberte destruido de inmediato, escoria. No hay secreto suficientemente valioso como para justificar tu existencia. Ya no me cabe ninguna duda».

languages.text: « Ma plus grande faute est de ne pas vous avoir détruit immédiatement, vermine. Aucun secret n'est assez précieux pour justifier de préserver votre existence. J'en ai désormais la certitude. »
languages.original_text: "My greatest transgression is that I didn't destroy you immediately, you wretch. There is no secret valuable enough to justify your existence. Of that, I am now certain."

traits.locale_text: « Ma plus grande faute est de ne pas vous avoir détruit immédiatement, vermine. Aucun secret n'est assez précieux pour justifier de préserver votre existence. J'en ai désormais la certitude. »

languages.text: "Benim en büyük suçum seni anında yok etmemek oldu. Hiçbir sır, varlığını haklı çıkaramaz. Artık bundan eminim."
languages.original_text: "My greatest transgression is that I didn't destroy you immediately, you wretch. There is no secret valuable enough to justify your existence. Of that, I am now certain."

traits.locale_text: "Benim en büyük suçum seni anında yok etmemek oldu. Hiçbir sır, varlığını haklı çıkaramaz. Artık bundan eminim."

languages.text: "Mein größtes Vergehen war es, Euch nicht sofort zu vernichten, Teufel. Kein Geheimnis ist wertvoll genug, um Eure Existenz zu rechtfertigen. Dessen bin ich mir mittlerweile sicher."
languages.original_text: "My greatest transgression is that I didn't destroy you immediately, you wretch. There is no secret valuable enough to justify your existence. Of that, I am now certain."

traits.locale_text: "Mein größtes Vergehen war es, Euch nicht sofort zu vernichten, Teufel. Kein Geheimnis ist wertvoll genug, um Eure Existenz zu rechtfertigen. Dessen bin ich mir mittlerweile sicher."

languages.text: 「私の最大の罪は、あなたの言葉に惑わされたことです。それは真実ではありませんか？」{n}エオガンは依然として慎重に視線を逸らします。彼の言葉に込められた苦味を誰に向けたものなのかは、知る由もありません。{/n}
languages.original_text: "My greatest transgression is that I was enticed by your words, stranger. Is that not the truth?" {n}Eogunn still carefully averts his gaze. It is impossible to tell at whom the bitterness in his words is directed.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「私の最大の罪は、あなたの言葉に惑わされたことです。それは真実ではありませんか？」{n}エオガンは依然として慎重に視線を逸らします。彼の言葉に込められた苦味を誰に向けたものなのかは、知る由もありません。{/n}
